cases.user_input: milk bikyo tara paisa thaha chaina, customer bhagyo lagcha
cases.erp_action: Do NOT post entry without confirmation. Investigate first. If confirmed unpaid: Debit Sundry Debtor/Loss, Credit Sales. Flag as potential bad debt.

cases.user_input: cow milk 40 litre aayo, 60 rupees liter, cash payment gare
cases.erp_action: Create Purchase Entry: Debit Purchase-Cow Milk NPR 2400, Credit Cash NPR 2400. Update inventory +40L cow milk.

cases.user_input: employee le ghee chori lagyo, 500gm
cases.erp_action: Create Loss Entry: Debit Theft Loss / Abnormal Loss A/c (at cost), Credit Ghee Inventory A/c. Note: Handle HR/disciplinary action separately. Consider recovery from employee.

cases.user_input: आज दूध बिकेन, सबै फर्काउनु पर्‍यो
cases.erp_action: If returned to supplier: Debit Supplier Payable, Credit Purchase-Milk. If discarded: Debit Spoilage Loss, Credit Milk Inventory. Clarify first.

cases.user_input: milk 1 litre kitty ko? 65 rupees cha
cases.erp_action: Price inquiry confirmed at NPR 65/litre. If update needed: Update Item Master selling price for relevant milk type.

cases.user_input: ghar bhada ko lagi 2000 advance tiryo
cases.erp_action: If security deposit: Debit Security Deposit Asset NPR 2000, Credit Cash NPR 2000. If advance rent: Debit Prepaid Rent NPR 2000, Credit Cash NPR 2000. Adjust when rent falls due.

cases.user_input: 500 ml lassi bottle, 15 pcs banaayo ghar ma, bech na jani sakyo
cases.erp_action: Record in-house production: Transfer milk used from milk inventory to lassi inventory at cost. Then record sales separately. Unsold = closing stock.

cases.user_input: Khalti balance check gara, kati cha?
cases.erp_action: Fetch Khalti Wallet Account balance from ERP books. Display current book balance. Reconcile against Khalti app statement if needed.

cases.user_input: aaj ghee ko 1 kg pack 10 ta aayo, 600 each, supplier Puja Dairy
cases.erp_action: Create Purchase Entry: Debit Purchase-Ghee NPR 6000, Credit Cash/Puja Dairy Payable NPR 6000. Update inventory +10 pcs (10kg) ghee.

cases.user_input: monthly stock compare garyam, system ma 15kg dahi cha, actual 12kg matra cha
cases.erp_action: Create Stock Adjustment Entry: Debit Inventory Shortage Loss (3kg x cost), Credit Inventory-Dahi. Update physical stock = 12kg.

cases.user_input: aaja discount diyera sale badhyo, 10% off diye sabailai
cases.erp_action: After total sales data: Record daily sales summary with discount line. Debit Cash/eSewa/Khalti, Credit Sales (at net price after discount). Or: Debit Cash, Debit Discount Expense, Credit Sales at full price.

cases.user_input: credit card machine lina manlaagyo, EMI available cha?
cases.erp_action: No journal entry. Advisory: Contact banks (NMB, NIC Asia, Nabil, Machhapuchchhre, etc.) or eSewa/Khalti/FonePay for POS terminal. Monthly MDR charges applicable on transactions. If purchased: add to Fixed Asset Register.

cases.user_input: aaj pikaas festival, demand badhyo, stock sakkiyo bich din ma
cases.erp_action: Log stock-out event. Record: sold-out time, estimated lost sales. For next festival: set reorder level higher. Consider pre-ordering before festivals (Dashain, Tihar, Teej, etc.).

cases.user_input: milk supplier badlyo naya aaayo, contract garnu parcha
cases.erp_action: Create New Supplier Profile in ERP: Name, Address, PAN, Bank Details, Payment Terms, Product, Rate, Delivery Schedule. No accounting entry yet — first transaction will generate entries.

cases.user_input: sabai accounts bata report nikaal, kaha paisa cha, kaha nai cha, full picture
cases.erp_action: Generate: (1) Balance Sheet — Assets (Cash, Bank, eSewa, Khalti, Inventory, Debtors, Advances), Liabilities (Creditors, Loans), Equity. (2) P&L Statement. (3) Cash Flow Summary. (4) Debtor Aging. (5) Creditor Aging. Display as dashboard.

cases.user_input: delivery boy lai ek hapta ko 1500 diye cycle petrol kharcha
cases.erp_action: Create Expense Entry: Debit Transport/Delivery Expense NPR 1500, Credit Cash NPR 1500.

cases.user_input: Pashupati Dairy bata brand ghee kinyo, 48 packs 500gm, 340 per pack, invoice aaayo VAT sita
cases.erp_action: If VAT registered: Debit Purchase-Ghee (base) + Debit Input VAT, Credit Pashupati Dairy Payable (incl. VAT). If NOT VAT registered: Debit Purchase-Ghee (total incl. VAT as cost), Credit Payable. Update inventory +48 pcs ghee.
cases.amount: NPR 16,320 (48 x 340) plus VAT amount per invoice

cases.user_input: mero saathi le paisa udhaaro liyako cha shop bata, 1000 rupees, personal ho
cases.erp_action: Option A: Treat as Owner Drawing: Debit Drawings NPR 1000, Credit Cash NPR 1000. Option B: Treat as Other Receivable: Debit Loan to Friends NPR 1000, Credit Cash NPR 1000. Clarify with owner.

cases.user_input: sabai cheez ठीक cha, aaja koi tension chaina
cases.erp_action: No action required. Log status: Business operations normal. No pending entries flagged.
